headline: ₹100-400 Cr at risk over medium term if ESG-driven capital outflows or regulatory penalties materialize. — Adani Power secures approval for Nagpur coal mine, reinforcing fossil fuel dependency amid ESG scrutiny
what_matters: Triggers BRSR, GRI, TCFD disclosure obligations; non-compliance risks SEBI trading restrictions.
Possible P/E compression (5-10%) if FII outflows occur due to negative ESG sentiment.
Potential for higher cost of capital (20-40bps) if ESG ratings decline or SEBI scrutiny intensifies.
